Despite the de-escalation, concerns linger over the Strait of Hormuz and Houthi actions impacting Red Sea shipping. OPEC+ agreed to boost output, but analysts doubt its effectiveness due to production struggles.

title: Federal data on H-1B visa application shows decline in filings by Google, Meta, Amazon
description: Tech giants like Google and Amazon are reducing H-1B visa filings, while AI leaders such as OpenAI and Nvidia are significantly increasing them. This surge reflects a fierce competition for top talent, with companies willing to pay more to secure specialized researchers. New policy changes, including higher fees and a lottery favoring experienced workers, are also shaping the landscape.

title: Vijay honours chess champion: CM felicitates Praggnanandhaa with Rs 50 lakh

title: At 15, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi isn't just scoring runs — he's redefining batting
description: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's record-breaking IPL 2026 season earned him a maiden India call-up at just 15. The left-hander amassed 776 runs and smashed 72 sixes, dismantling bowling attacks with a unique technique that allows him to dominate length, short and full deliveries alike. While yorkers offered some control, his remarkable adaptability and power suggest Indian cricket may have uncovered a generational talent.

title: NFL Trade Rumors: Lions, Ravens Emerge as Top Fits for Veteran Edge Rusher

With 53.5 career sacks and extensive playoff experience, Ogbah is emerging as an intriguing option for contenders seeking additional edge-rushing depth. The Detroit Lions have been identified as a strong potential fit, while other teams could enter the conversation as roster needs evolve. Here’s a closer look at the latest speculation, insider analysis, contract outlook, and what could be next for the veteran defensive end in 2026.

Inside Simone Biles and Jonathan Owens’ $27M fortune and luxury life
description: Simone Biles and Jonathan Owens have an estimated combined net worth of $27 million in 2026. Simone accounts for about $25 million through endorsements, appearances, tours, and investments, while Jonathan’s $2 million comes mainly from NFL contracts. The couple also owns valuable real estate and enjoys a luxury lifestyle, helping secure their financial future beyond sports.

title: Patrick & Brittany Mahomes net worth 2026: Wealth, earnings & luxury life
description: Patrick Mahomes is embracing his quick recovery by enjoying sports with wife Brittany Mahomes. Their shared passion for sports extends to investments in various franchises. They co-own the Kansas City Current. The couple has been high school sweethearts. They have built a life together with three children and a luxurious Missouri mansion.

title: Gabrielle Union reveals why she nearly let Dwyane Wade go amid marriage struggles
description: Dwyane Wade, the NBA legend, and his wife, Gabrielle Union, prefer to live relatively private lives as they raise their daughter, Kaavia, together, as they continue to inspire billions around the world with their love and commitment that they have shown to each other. While Dwyane Wade and Gabrielle Union seem to be happy together, their marriage has been far from perfect.
